subcodes.first_line: O candle of the love of God! In this radiant assemblage be luminous and resplendent, that thy rays may ascend to exalted heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله در این انجمن پر نور و ساطع باش تا اشعه اوج گیرد و باستان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @being a source of light; guidance
